title: The Messy Alphabet Book
author: Sesame Workshop
description: Join Elmo, Oscar, and their Sesame Street friends as they splat, splash, crash, and dash their way through the alphabet! You don't need to be an avid reader, a performer or an expert with children to relax and enjoy new fun ways to engage with the little ones during story time. This brand new and unique approach to children's books allows anyone who is shy or slightly discouraged at the thought of the perfect reading aloud experience.
